summary: Data Scientist with 3+ years of experience building AI and machine learning solutions for business impact. Proven track record in predictive analytics, data-driven decision support, and deploying end-to-end ML systems. Achieved 95.2% accuracy in disease prediction using ensemble ML and LLMs, and delivered measurable revenue growth through recommendation engines. Former banking professional with hands-on experience in credit risk assessment, treasury operations, and financial analytics. Combines deep technical expertise with strong domain knowledge in financial services.

skills.label: AI & NLP
skills.value: LLMs, GPT, Rasa, Hugging Face, Whisper

experience.title: Data Scientist (Hybrid)
bullets: Designed and maintained dynamic performance dashboards using Power BI and advanced Excel to track KPIs across pipeline, conversion, and revenue metrics.
Developed and deployed AI-powered recommendation systems and customer segmentation models, driving 25% revenue growth during peak season.
Built and optimised content-based recommendation engines for product upselling, increasing attach rates and average transaction value.
Delivered data-driven reports and forecasts to senior leadership, translating complex analytical insights into actionable business strategy.
Conducted end-to-end data pipeline management – from data collection and cleaning to model evaluation and deployment.

experience.title: Software Development Consultant
bullets: Identified, designed, and deployed AI-driven solutions automating digital workflows across multiple client projects, enhancing operational efficiency.
Provided expert-level programming support including debugging, code optimisation, and end-to-end software implementation.

experience.title: Azure Data Scientist
bullets: Engineered a high-accuracy speech-to-text system, boosting transcription performance across diverse accents and noisy environments.
Developed a Voice Assistant chatbot using Rasa and GPT-3 for media-player interaction, improving automation and accessibility.
Evaluated and optimised speaker diarisation techniques for multi-speaker audio, enhancing conversation segmentation quality.
Applied advanced ML techniques in Python and R for data analysis, visualisation, and production-grade research pipelines.
Worked with Microsoft Azure Cognitive Services and Hugging Face to improve speech recognition systems.

experience.title: Direct Sales Executive
bullets: Expanded customer base through strategic prospecting and relationship management, contributing to deposit mobilisation and product uptake.
Assessed creditworthiness of loan applicants and delivered risk-based recommendations, supporting high-quality credit decisions and portfolio growth.

experience.title: Assistant Treasury Trainee
bullets: Participated in Money Market trading activities and contributed to strategic financial decision-making.
Monitored the bank's interest rate positions and Net Open Position, ensuring optimal financial stability.

experience.title: Intern – Data & Underwriting
bullets: Performed time-series analysis of monthly claims data to identify predominant patterns for management decision-making.
Processed underwriting tasks and prepared policy documentation.

education.degree: Master of Mathematical Sciences – Data Science
education.note: Grade: 84/100 (Very Good Pass)  |  Thesis: IoT and AI for Secure Remote Healthcare Monitoring

education.institution: University of Toronto Mississauga (MasterCard Scholarship – $4,000 CAD)

projects.title: AI for Secure Remote Healthcare Monitoring
bullets: Built a prototype achieving 95.2% accuracy and F1 score by integrating an ensemble ML model with MedGemma 4b-it for disease prediction and clinical triage across 5 classes.
Deployed an interactive Streamlit Cloud application for patient vitals input, risk analysis, and AI-guided triage feedback.

projects.title: Dubai Real Estate Analytics
bullets: Interactive analytics dashboard for the Dubai property market; enables filtering by location, type, and price range with visualisations for data-driven investment decisions.

projects.title: PDF Merger Application
bullets: Streamlit web application for merging multiple PDF files into a single document, deployed on Streamlit Cloud for free public access.

awards: Publication: Improving Speech Recognition for Ghanaian Accents Using Transformer-Based Accent Classification – Accepted.
Best Paper Runner-Up Award – PA-AISS 2025 Conference, for research quality, originality, and impact. ($200)
AIMS Cooperative Program Scholarship – MasterCard Scholars Foundation & AIMS-Senegal, 2022–2024. ($50,000)
Healthcare Management Scholarship – MasterCard & University of Toronto Mississauga, 2023–2024. ($4,000 CAD)

conferences.name: Winter School – Computational Modelling in Marine Ecology, Fisheries & Climate
